commits.message: Docs: update README and workflow config

files.content:
# Modularity AI

Updated documentation for local workflow testing.

name: Tests

on: [push]

jobs:
  phpunit:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: echo "Running tests..."
